text:
Carlos Yulo made history when he won gold for the Philippines at theParisOlympics– and will receive a lifetime supply of some tasty treats as a reward.

The Philippines have only ever won three gold medals at the Olympics, with gymnastics star Yulo responsible for two of them.

He won the men’s floor and vault events at the 2024 games, turning him into an overnight sensation in his country.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris 2024 Olympics

But as well as having the honour of being a two-time Olympic gold medalist, the 24-year-old is also in line to receive several incredible gifts when he returns home.

The Philippine government are reportedly awarding 10 million pesos (over £136,000) to any of their gold medalists from Paris, in addition to 6 million pesos (over £81,000) in cash incentives from their House of Representatives.

But it’s local businesses that have promised Yulo the most eye-catching gifts, with a real estate firm offering him a fully furnished three-bedroom property in a prestigious area of the coastal city of Taguig.

A lifetime supply of ramen also awaits courtesy of the Hagemu Sushi and Ramen Bar in Calasiao, who posted onFacebook: ‘Congratulations to our very own Golden Boy on clinching his second gold medal in men’s artistic gymnastics!

‘To celebrate your outstanding achievement, we are thrilled to extend a special gift: FREE LIFETIME RAMEN not just for you, but also for your wonderful and supportive girlfriend, Chloe Anjeleigh.

‘Enjoy the taste of victory and love with every bowl!’

Other restaurant chains will gift him endless amounts of macaroni cheese and grilled chicken.

On the over end of the scale, a gastroenterologist has offered free consultations and colonoscopies for life.

‘I was just hoping to perform well. I didn’t really expect a medal,’ Yulo said after winning his golds.

‘It really felt like a bonus for me. It’s crazy, because last night [Saturday] I couldn’t sleep.

‘It still didn’t sink in. This morning I was so sleepy. I didn’t know what to do. But I did it today.’

title: Olympian wins lifetime supply of ramen & macaroni cheese after gold medal win | Metro News
description: Carlos Yulo won gold for the Philippines at the Paris 2024 Olympics - and will receive a lifetime supply of some tasty treats as a result.
